{{CargoRelic
|name=War and Peace
|class_id=21506
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|birthday=05-13
|source=
|description=On May 13, 1869 AD, Tolstoy finished this great novel.<br>"War and Peace" has 4 parts, divided into 16 volumes and written with millions of words. This book gained Tolstoy the title of a world-class author. This book tells the story of Duke Andrei who enlisted himself in the army to join the war between France and Russia in pursuit of honor and glory. But then he suffered serious injuries and the death of his wife. When the French invasion of Russia broke out, for the dignity of his people, he resolutely returned to the front lines and died for the country.
[Classic Quotes]
You can't grow when everyone says yes to you. My tongue is my enemy, it can bring misfortune. Whom the gods would destroy they first make mad. Harming others is wrong.
|fame=69
|art=54
|fth=63
|civ=109
|tech=67
|ss1=Snail Leadership +6<br>All Minion ATK +0.9%<br>All Minion RUSH +0.9%
|ss2=Snail Leadership +7<br>All Minion ATK +1.2%<br>All Minion RUSH +1.2%
|ss3=Snail Leadership +8<br>All Minion ATK +1.5%<br>All Minion RUSH +1.5%
|ss4=Snail Leadership +10<br>All Minion ATK +2.1%<br>All Minion RUSH +2.1%
|ss5=Snail Leadership +12<br>All Minion ATK +2.7%<br>All Minion RUSH +2.7%
|ss6=Snail Leadership +15<br>All Minion ATK +3.6%<br>All Minion RUSH +3.6%
|ss7=Snail Leadership +15<br>All Minion ATK +3.6%<br>All Minion RUSH +3.6%<br>Snail Leadership +10 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail DEF +600
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Food Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ATK +600
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Four Families|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +3|orange}}
|3name=Helen|3rec=7.52M|3atk=70184|3defense=46623|3hp=1439832|3weak=12663
|4name=Pierre|4rec=13.45M|4atk=95907|4defense=63711|4hp=2586781|4weak=15967
|5name=Andrew|5rec=28.67M|5atk=126793|5defense=84228|5hp=4318495|5weak=18403
|6name=Natasha|6rec=45.82M|6atk=163126|6defense=108364|6hp=6838143|6weak=19780
|Arec=65.46M|Aatk=204714|Adefense=135992|Ahp=10747274|Aweak=22690
}}}}
